description_long: This coupe car features a compact, angular body with a glossy black finish and a classic hatchback silhouette. The vehicle has four doors, each with silver trim and flush-mounted handles, and is equipped with white, multi-spoke wheels. The front end displays rectangular headlights and a subtle red accent on the grille, while the rear includes a license plate, red taillights, and a rear hatch. The windows are tinted dark, and the roofline is straight, giving the car a practical yet sporty appearance. Chrome accents are visible around the windows and on the door handles, enhancing its urban appeal. The overall design suggests a late 20th-century European or Japanese compact coupe, suitable for city driving.
description: A compact, glossy black coupe car with four doors, white wheels, and chrome window trim, featuring a straight roofline and hatchback rear.
description_view_0: Side view showing two doors, white wheels, and chrome window trim on the left side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the license plate, red taillights, and rear hatch.
description_view_2: Side view showing two doors, white wheels, and chrome window trim on the right side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying rectangular headlights, a red-accented grille, and the hood.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with two side windows per side
